<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Event; use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request; use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response; use Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\HttpKernelInterface; /** * Allows to execute logic after a response was sent. * * Since it's only triggered on main requests, the `getRequestType()` method * will always return the value of `HttpKernelInterface::MAIN_REQUEST`. * * @author Jordi Boggiano <j.boggiano@seld.be> */ final class TerminateEvent extends KernelEvent { public function __construct( HttpKernelInterface $kernel, Request $request, private Response $response, ) { parent::__construct($kernel, $request, HttpKernelInterface::MAIN_REQUEST); } public function getResponse(): Response { return $this->response; } }
